title: Ordinanza dwar il-Kontroll ta' l-Importazzjoni ta' Annimali Imħassra bl-Att XV tal-2025
title_en: Ordinanza dwar il-Kontroll ta' l-Importazzjoni ta' Annimali Imħassra bl-Att XV tal-2025
description: Official text from legislation.mt (eli/cap/86/mlt, expression eli/cap/86/20250709/mlt).

provisions.title: Short title
provisions.content:
The Minister responsible for agriculture may, whenever he
thinks it expedient so to do for the protection of animal husbandry
in Malta, make and, when made, vary or repeal, regulations for
prohibiting or otherwise restricting and controlling the importation
of animals or of any specified kind of animals into Malta.

Power of Minister
to make
regulations.
Amended by:
L.N. 4 of 1963.

provisions.title: Short title
provisions.content:
If any person lands or attempts to land any animal in
contravention of any regulation made by the Minister responsible
for agriculture under the last preceding article, he shall be liable to
the penalties imposed on persons importing or attempting to import
goods the importation of which is prohibited by the Customs
Ordinance and the animals in respect of which the offence is
committed shall be forfeited.

Offences and
penalties.
Amended by:
L.N. 4 of 1963.

*This Ordinance has been repealed by Act XV of 2025.
†See Proclamation No. IV of the 6th of February, 1935.
